data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor's profits surge by 35% as it meets AI demand, with Q4 net sales hitting $33.73 billion.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE: TSM) reported fourth-quarter results that exceeded analyst expectations due to high demand for its advanced processor technologies used in artificial intelligence applications. The company's quarterly net sales were $33.73 billion, a 20.5% increase year-over-year and surpassing the analyst consensus of $33.27 billion. Net income was $16.31 billion, up 35.0% Y/Y, and earnings per share were $3.14, beating the analyst estimate of $2.79. TSM provided an optimistic revenue forecast for Q1 2026. The company plays a vital role in the industry ecosystem as a key supplier to tech giants like Nvidia and Apple. 3-nm technologies accounted for 28% of total revenue.

data.title: McConaughey warns against AI voice misuse, armed with federal trademarks to combat theft. Embracing tech cautiously.
data.description: Matthew McConaughey is now armed with federal trademarks to combat AI voice theft. However, he is also adopting the technology in his own way. The trademarks provide legal protection against unauthorized use of his voice. This move comes as the actor embraces AI technology while ensuring it aligns with his preferences. The trademarks offer him recourse in case of voice theft, highlighting the importance of safeguarding one's intellectual property. The actor's approach demonstrates a proactive stance in navigating the intersection of technology and personal boundaries.

data.title: HOTELEX Shanghai 2026 on March 30-April 2 offers global businesses access to Asia's hospitality, foodservice market.
data.description: The dates for HOTELEX Shanghai 2026 have been announced as March 30th to April 2nd, 2026. This event serves as a significant platform for hospitality and foodservice suppliers worldwide to access the lucrative Chinese and Asian markets. Following the remarkable achievements of the 2025 edition, the upcoming event aims to further enhance business opportunities in the region.

data.title: AAVE price predicted to reach $190-195 by February 2026, with resistance at $184 and strong support levels. Bullish outlook despite mixed signals.
data.description: The forecast for the price of AAVE suggests a positive trend towards reaching $190-195 by February, despite some conflicting indicators. Based on technical analysis, a significant barrier is anticipated at $184, while robust support levels remain intact.

data.title: LDO price projected to reach $0.75-$0.85 by Feb 2026 despite short-term bearish signals. Short-term target: $0.67.
data.description: Summary of LDO Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), the target price is set at $0.67. Looking ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecast falls within the range of $0.75 to $0.85. The bullish breakout level is identified at $0.69, while a crucial support level stands at $0.59.

data.title: HBAR price may reach $0.16 by January-end despite hurdles at $0.12. Analysts advise caution due to mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Hedera (HBAR) is currently priced at $0.12, with analysts predicting it to reach $0.16 by the end of the month. However, there are conflicting signals as bearish momentum and a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicate a need for caution in approaching this investment.

data.title: Dogwifhat (WIF) aims for $0.47 breakout post $2.5M whale buying, RSI 56.20, MACD bullish. Analysts foresee $0.42-$0.50 range.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogwifhat (WIF) is currently aiming to surpass a resistance barrier at $0.47. Its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral 56.20, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator indicates positive momentum. Analysts predict a target range of $0.42 to $0.50, with a notable whale engaging in buying activities amounting to $2.5 million.

data.title: Analysts project PEPE may hit $0.00000690 by Jan 2026, offering substantial growth amid current obstacles.
data.description: Several cryptocurrency experts are forecasting that the value of PEPE could surge to $0.00000690 by January 2026. This projection indicates a substantial increase in value, despite the existing technical obstacles faced by the cryptocurrency.
